link: Simulating Students with Large Language Models: A Review of Architecture
authors: Mechanisms
code: and Role Modelling in Education with Generative AI
zh_abstract: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.06078
column12: Luis Marquez-Carpintero, Alberto Lopez-Sellers, Miguel Cazorla
column14: 本文系统回顾了基于LLM的学生模拟研究，涵盖架构设计、行为建模和多智能体课堂交互。研究指出该方向在教学评估与课程设计上潜力显著，但仍面临偏差控制、评测可靠性与教育目标对齐问题。

title: Teaching According to Students' Aptitude: Personalized Mathematics Tutoring via Persona-
authors: and Forgetting-Aware LLMs
zh_abstract: Yang Wu, Rujing Yao, Tong Zhang, Yufei Shi, Zhuoren Jiang, Zhushan Li, Xiaozhong Liu
column13: 该工作提出TASA框架，将学生画像、学习记忆与遗忘曲线结合到数学辅导中，实现随时间动态更新的个性化教学。实验表明其在学习效果和教学适应性上优于对比方法。

title: LLM-as-a-Grader: Practical Insights from Large Language Model for Short-Answer and Report Evaluation
authors: Grace Byun, Swati Rajwal, Jinho D. Choi
zh_abstract: 论文评估GPT-4o在真实课堂中的短答题与课程报告评分能力。结果显示与助教评分高度相关，但在开放性和技术性答案上仍有波动，说明可用于助评但需人工把关。

title: Next Token Knowledge Tracing: Exploiting Pretrained LLM Representations to Decode Student Behaviour
authors: Max Norris, Kobi Gal, Sahan Bulathwela
zh_abstract: 作者将知识追踪重构为下一词预测任务，并显式引入题目文本信息。该方法在多个基准上超过现有KT模型，尤其在冷启动题目和新学生场景下泛化更强。

title: HISE-KT: Synergizing Heterogeneous Information Networks and LLMs for Explainable Knowledge Tracing with Meta-Path Optimization
authors: Zhiyi Duan, Zixing Shi, Hongyu Yuan, Qi Wang
zh_abstract: HISE-KT融合异构信息网络与LLM，通过自动筛选高质量元路径提升预测与解释能力。实验显示在准确率和可解释性上均优于既有知识追踪方法。

title: CLLMRec: LLM-powered Cognitive-Aware Concept Recommendation via Semantic Alignment and Prerequisite Knowledge Distillation
authors: Xiangrui Xiong, Yichuan Lu, Zifei Pan, Chang Sun
zh_abstract: 该研究面向MOOC概念推荐，利用LLM进行语义对齐与先修知识蒸馏，减少对高质量知识图谱的依赖。结果表明其可更好地结合学习者认知状态进行个性化推荐。

title: Generating Reading Comprehension Exercises with Large Language Models for Educational Applications
authors: Xingyu Huang, Fei Jiang, Jianli Xiao
zh_abstract: 作者提出RCEG框架用于自动生成英语阅读理解练习，采用“生成+判别”流程提升内容质量。实验在相关性、认知适配性和教学对齐方面均有明显改进。

title: Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework For Math Problem Generation
authors: Kia Karbasi, Kevin Hong, Mohammad Amin Samadi, Gregory Pottie
zh_abstract: 该工作通过多智能体协作迭代生成数学题，重点控制题目难度与认知负荷。初步评测显示在清晰性、可解性和教学价值上优于单次生成范式。

title: EduMod-LLM: A Modular Approach for Designing Flexible and Transparent Educational Assistants
authors: Meenakshi Mittal, Rishi Khare, Mihran Miroyan, Chancharik Mitra, Narges Norouzi
zh_abstract: 论文提出模块化教育问答流水线，拆分函数调用、检索与生成三个环节做细粒度评估。该设计有助于定位系统失效点，提升教育助手的透明性与可调试性。

title: EduGuardBench: A Holistic Benchmark for Evaluating the Pedagogical Fidelity and Adversarial Safety of LLMs as Simulated Teachers
authors: Yilin Jiang, Mingzi Zhang, Xuanyu Yin, Sheng Jin, Suyu Lu, Zuocan Ying, Zengyi Yu, Xiangjie Kong
zh_abstract: EduGuardBench同时评估LLM“教师”的教学专业性与对抗安全性，覆盖教学失当与学术不端等风险。大规模实验揭示模型在教育角色扮演中的能力与安全表现存在明显分化。

title: Benchmarking Educational LLMs with Analytics: A Case Study on Gender Bias in Feedback
authors: Yishan Du, Conrad Borchers, Mutlu Cukurova
zh_abstract: 研究基于反事实样本分析教育反馈中的性别偏差，发现多种模型对性别线索存在不对称语义响应。论文给出了教育场景下偏差审计和部署规范的实践建议。

title: Scaling Equitable Reflection Assessment in Education via Large Language Models and Role-Based Feedback Agents
authors: Chenyu Zhang, Xiaohang Luo
zh_abstract: 该系统通过五类角色化LLM代理协同完成反思作业评分与反馈，强调公平性监控与元认知引导。实证结果显示其在大规模场景下可提供接近专家一致性的高质量反馈。

title: LOOM: Personalized Learning Informed by Daily LLM Conversations Toward Long-Term Mastery via a Dynamic Learner Memory Graph
authors: Justin Cui, Kevin Pu, Tovi Grossman
zh_abstract: LOOM利用日常对话构建动态学习者记忆图谱，在“即时需求”与“长期目标”之间做个性化课程编排。用户研究显示其有助于发现知识缺口并维持持续学习轨迹。

title: Examining the Usage of Generative AI Models in Student Learning Activities for Software Programming
authors: Rufeng Chen, Shuaishuai Jiang, Jiyun Shen, AJung Moon, Lili Wei
zh_abstract: 受控实验发现，GenAI可显著提升编程任务完成率，尤其对初学者更明显，但不必然带来知识增益。作者指出教学中需引导学生将AI用于学习过程而非仅用于解题替代。

title: Scaffolding Metacognition in Programming Education: Understanding Student-AI Interactions and Design Implications
authors: Boxuan Ma, Huiyong Li, Gen Li, Li Chen, Cheng Tang, Yinjie Xie, Chenghao Gu, Atsushi Shimada, Shin'ichi Konomi
zh_abstract: 该研究分析万级学生-AI对话日志，从元认知视角审视编程学习中的AI使用方式。结论强调教育AI应支持学习者计划、监控与反思，而非弱化其认知参与。

title: Navigating the Ethical and Societal Impacts of Generative AI in Higher Computing Education
authors: Janice Mak, Joyce Nakatumba-Nabende, Tony Clear, Alison Clear, Ibrahim Albluwi, Oana Andrei, Lorenzo Angeli, Stephen MacNeil, Solomon Sunday Oyelere, Matthew Hale Rattigan, Judy Sheard, Tingting Zhu
zh_abstract: 论文通过系统综述与高校政策分析，提出高等计算机教育中GenAI伦理与社会影响框架。该框架可用于指导课程治理、学术诚信与公平性相关决策。

title: SMRC: Aligning Large Language Models with Student Reasoning for Mathematical Error Correction
authors: Biaojie Zeng, Min Zhang, Juan Zhou, Fengrui Liu, Ruiyang Huang, Xin Lin
zh_abstract: SMRC面向“教师式”数学纠错，利用MCTS探索纠错路径并提供过程级监督。其在公开数据集和自建高中数学基准上都取得更好的纠错效果与教学适用性。

title: Human or LLM as Standardized Patients? A Comparative Study for Medical Education
authors: Bingquan Zhang, Xiaoxiao Liu, Yuchi Wang, Lei Zhou, Qianqian Xie, Benyou Wang
zh_abstract: 该研究提出EasyMED虚拟标准化病人框架，并与真人标准化病人进行对照。结果显示其在一致性、可扩展性和成本上具优势，且学习成效接近真人训练。

title: Enhancing Large Language Models for Automated Homework Assessment in Undergraduate Circuit Analysis
authors: Liangliang Chen, Huiru Xie, Zhihao Qin, Yiming Guo, Jacqueline Rohde, Ying Zhang
zh_abstract: 作者通过多步提示、上下文增强和提示性反馈改进GPT-4o在电路作业评估中的表现。正确率从74.71%提升至97.70%，展示了工程教育中自动评估的可行路径。

title: Human Experts' Evaluation of Generative AI for Contextualizing STEAM Education in the Global South
authors: Matthew Nyaaba, Macharious Nabang, Patrick Kyeremeh, Ibrahim Nantomah, Collins Owusu-Fordjour, Martin Ako, Bismark Nyaaba Akanzire, Kassim Korah Nantomah, Cecilia Issaka, Xiaoming Zhai
zh_abstract: 该文以加纳STEAM课程为例，评估GenAI在本土化教学设计中的作用。结果显示其能增强教学情境相关性，但在文化多样性表达上仍较薄弱，需教师与社区共同校正。

title: Build AI Assistants using Large Language Models and Agents to Enhance the Engineering Education of Biomechanics
authors: Hanzhi Yan, Qin Lu, Xianqiao Wang, Xiaoming Zhai, Tianming Liu, He Li
zh_abstract: 研究面向生物力学课程，结合RAG与多智能体系统分别处理概念问答和计算推导任务。实验表明该组合能显著提升专业领域教学助手的准确性、稳定性和可解释性。
